title: Product Designer, Products & Integrations
description: About Hone Hone is an online medical clinic at the forefront of transforming healthcare and enhancing longevity. We use cutting-edge scientific advancements to empower men and women to take control of their health and unlock their full potential. Our people are the heart of everything we do and drive our success. We approach every project through our brand values: Fight for the Customer Execute Ruthlessly Communicate Candidly, Clearly, and Kindly Collaborate Selflessly Practice Calculated Risk-Taking Maximize Joy and Gratitude Hone has been fully virtual from day one and will continue to be a remote-first employer. Our Ideal Candidate Our ideal candidate is a mission-driven, motivated multi-tasker who is invested in work that is fulfilling and impactful. They embrace change and tackle challenges with enthusiasm. They have an “all-in” disposition towards work, understanding that we are a fast-paced, high-growth organization with evolving priorities. They can excel at both independent tasks and collaborative work, leading with clear and candid communication. They exhibit humble leadership—the ability to drive initiatives forward while remaining excited about continuous learning and development opportunities. They feel strongly about being part of a team that advocates for people to live longer and better lives. The Role We’re looking for a Product Designer to join our Products & Integrations team . In this role, you’ll work as a critical contributor to own the end-to-end experience of discovering, researching, purchasing, and completing additional diagnostics and treatments. You’ll report directly to the Head of Product Design and partner with our design, product management, engineering, clinical, and marketing teams to improve this experience and subsequent patient outcomes.   You’ll thrive in this role if you: Have experience designing world-class e-commerce and marketing experiences Have a strong eye for design and care deeply about craft Excel at crafting bespoke marketing assets (product images, renderings, graphics, etc.) Enjoy blending strategic thinking and tactical execution, getting into the nitty details around user flows, screens, and UI states. Thinks broadly and explores multiple options before honing in on a final solution Enjoys collaborating with cross-functional team members – Product Managers, Engineers, and other Designers Can create world-class progressive designs that balance innovation, usability, and accessibility Takes pride in translating complex information into intuitive, elegant, and delightful interfaces Have a personal interest in preventative health and longevity Primary Responsibilities Key responsibilities for this role include (but are not limited to) the following: Work strategically as a partner with product management, engineering, and design leadership to define and design the product experience within our patient portal/application. Think big and explore divergent concepts while understanding how to converge and build iteratively towards your vision. Work across the design process, from user flows and low-fidelity wireframes to high-fidelity mockups and interactive prototypes to explore and communicate ideas. Create outstanding marketing  assets (custom images, iconography, etc.) that elevate the design of the page and connect with the intended audience. Provide creative and art direction to external partners (photographers, videographers, etc.) Advocate for design by sharing your work and presenting cross-functionally to senior stakeholders/leadership. Be able to articulate design decisions and goals. Participate in workshops, brainstorming sessions, and design thinking exercises. Qualifications To qualify for this role, candidates must meet the following criteria: 4+ years of experience in consumer product design, working as part of a product team in an agile environment A portfolio of outstanding design for consumer products, ecommerce, and marketing websites that showcase attention to detail and strong foundations in typography, interaction, visual design, and storytelling Highly proficient with current design and prototyping tools (Figma, Photoshop, etc.) Strong visual design craft Excellent communication skills Compensation Range $130,000 - $150,000 based on location and experience   Benefits* Hone wants our team to be in the best condition of their lives, so we offer a range of benefits including: A remote-first work environment Competitive compensation and equity options Health, dental, and vision insurance coverage Short-term disability and basic life coverage Flexible Spending Accounts (FSAs) Lifestyle Spending Accounts (LSAs) We follow federal holidays and have uncapped time off Budget for the technology tools you need (laptop, monitor, and/or special software) A focus on company-sponsored activities to foster engagement (both virtual and in-person) Waived membership fees for any Hone team members utilizing Hone products *These benefits are available to full-time, regular employees, and not to independent contractors, hourly or temporary employees, or interns. We are proud to be an equal-opportunity workplace committed to building a team culture that celebrates diversity and inclusion. We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions. Please contact us to request accommodation.
